ruleValue.description: Enable/disable a rule/filter/plugin, optionally with its own options and/or a severity override

description: Config file for textlint, the pluggable natural language linter. Based on https://textlint.org/docs/configuring.html. Rule/filter/plugin option shapes are defined by whichever rule package is installed, so their values are left permissive.

filters.description: Keyed by filter rule name, used to suppress errors matching a condition

plugins.description: Plugin names to enable, either as a list or as a name-to-options map

rules.description: Keyed by rule name (or "plugin-name/rule-name" for a plugin-provided rule)

title: textlint configuration (.textlintrc)
